description: A comprehensive intermediate course on Machine Learning covering supervised learning, neural networks, model evaluation, and real-world applications.

modules.title: Foundations of Machine Learning
modules.description: What ML is, types of learning, the ML pipeline from data to deployment.
objectives: Define machine learning and its types

modules.title: Supervised Learning Algorithms
modules.description: Linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees, SVMs — when to use what.
objectives: Choose the right algorithm for a problem

modules.title: Neural Networks & Deep Learning
modules.description: Perceptrons, backpropagation, CNNs, RNNs — building blocks of modern AI.
objectives: Design a simple neural network architecture

modules.title: Model Evaluation & Tuning
modules.description: Cross-validation, bias-variance tradeoff, hyperparameter tuning, avoiding overfitting.
objectives: Evaluate model performance with appropriate metrics

modules.title: ML in Production
modules.description: Feature engineering, MLOps, model monitoring, ethical considerations.
objectives: Identify ethical risks in ML systems
